name: Blitz-Pact & Silverhand • Top Dogs
description:
Krunch, krunch, krunch...

"Blitz-Pact."

"Mmh? Hey, give me like, 3 minutes before you shove an ad in my face! These crab legs sure are something else..."

"Not an ad. (Street business like that was banned, anyway—caused too much foot traffic.) This is about the job that you disappeared from, in favor of—"

"What? I was feeling a little bit peckish."

("With the entire menu at your table?")

"And pluuus, Anti-Crime guys know how my power works. I go zoom, I get hungry, I eat, repeat."

Swipe.

"..."

"...Et tu, Ira?"

"Shut up. You told me you were famished, but you didn't tell me you were at work. This'll be waiting for you when you get back."

Tap, tap, tap...

...tap tap tap.

Swipe.

"You, uh, gonna grab every plate one-by-one? No rush, I just thought the betrayal would be more substantial."

"FOCUS on your job."

Tap tap tap...

"As...I was saying. The situation blew up drastically. Two of our coworkers are injured, and the other two...walked away from the situation. (Suspension's pending.)"

"Oh. Really? Did you get the group of five with the Saguaro in it?"

"They were busy elsewhere."

"What abouuut...the rock woman?"

"Quit."

"The demon and that one guy?"

"They're the ones who walked away."

"The demon and that one girl?"

"They're the ones who were INJURED. How don't you know any of their hero names??"

"That one girl with a cyborg prosthetic, a bad attitude, and
creator: KendrickLamarHATER
